member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient
member.summary: Client for Android Debug Bridge services over native USB or TCP transports.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.Device
member.summary: Gets the connected device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ConnectAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to an ADB-capable device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ConnectTcpAsync(System.String,System.Int32,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects directly to an ADB daemon that is already listening on a TCP endpoint, commonly used for wireless debugging.
member.param: The device host name or IP address.
The ADB TCP port. The default is 5555.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ConnectWirelessAsync(System.String,System.Int32,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects directly to an ADB daemon that is already listening for wireless debugging.
member.param: The device host name or IP address.
The ADB TCP port. The default is 5555.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ConnectWirelessAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects directly to an ADB daemon discovered through mDNS.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.OpenStreamAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a raw ADB service stream.
member.param: The service name, such as shell:getprop.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ShellAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a shell command and returns its output.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ShellV2Async(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a shell command with the ADB shell v2 protocol and returns stdout, stderr, and the exit code separately.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ExecAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a command using the ADB exec service and returns its output.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.GetPropertyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads an Android system property using getprop.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.PushAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Int32,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pushes a stream to the device using ADB file sync.
member.param: The destination path on the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.PushAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pushes a stream to the device using ADB file sync with an explicit modification time.
member.param: The destination path on the device.
The modification time written to the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.PullAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pulls a file from the device using ADB file sync.
member.param: The source path on the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.LstatAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads file metadata without following symbolic links when the connected device supports that distinction.
member.returns: The file metadata, or when the path does not exist.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.StatAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads file metadata. On devices without sync stat v2, this falls back to the legacy lstat operation.
member.returns: The file metadata, or when the path does not exist.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ListDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists a directory using ADB file sync.
member.returns: The directory entries reported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.LogcatAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts streaming logcat output as UTF-8 lines.
member.returns: An async stream of logcat lines.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.InstallApkAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Installs an APK by pushing it to a temporary path and invoking package manager install.
member.param: The APK file name used on the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.CreateInstallSessionAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates an Android package install session.
member.param: Optional total package size for the session.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.InstallPackagesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile},AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Installs one or more APK files using an Android package install session.
member.param: The APK files or split APK files to install.
Optional cumulative byte progress across all package files.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.InstallStagedPackagesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile},AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Installs one or more APK files using a staged Android package install session.
member.param: The APK files or split APK files to install.
Optional cumulative byte progress across all package files.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ListPackagesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists installed package names using the device package manager.
member.returns: The package names reported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.UninstallPackageAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uninstalls an Android package.
member.param: Whether to keep package data and cache directories.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ClearPackageDataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Clears package data using the device package manager.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.StartPortForwardAsync(System.Int32,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a local TCP listener and forwards accepted sockets to a device-side ADB socket.
member.param: The local TCP port. Use zero to request an ephemeral port.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ReverseForwardAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests device-side reverse forwarding from a device socket to a host socket.
member.param: Whether an existing reverse mapping must be preserved instead of replaced.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.RemoveReverseForwardAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a device-side reverse forwarding rule.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.RemoveAllReverseForwardsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes all device-side reverse forwarding rules.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.ListReverseForwardsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists device-side reverse forwarding rules.
member.returns: The textual reverse forwarding table reported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.RebootAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reboots the device normally.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.RebootBootloaderAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reboots the device to bootloader.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClient.RebootRecoveryAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reboots the device to recovery.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions
member.summary: Options used when connecting to an ADB device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.TransportFactory
member.summary: Gets or sets the USB transport factory used by . When omitted, the global transport registry is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.Authenticator
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticator used for device authorization.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.EnableTls
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ADB STLS transport upgrades are allowed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.TlsTargetHost
member.summary: Gets or sets the TLS target host name used for ADB TLS handshakes.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.TlsCertificateProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional client certificate provider for ADB TLS handshakes.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.SystemIdentity
member.summary: Gets or sets the host identity payload advertised during connection.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbClientOptions.MaxPayload
member.summary: Gets or sets the host maximum payload size.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbDirectoryEntry
member.summary: Represents a directory entry returned by the ADB file sync list operation.
member.param: The entry name as reported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbDirectoryEntry.#ctor(System.String,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat)
member.summary: Represents a directory entry returned by the ADB file sync list operation.
member.param: The entry name as reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbDirectoryEntry.Name
member.summary: The entry name as reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbDirectoryEntry.Statistics
member.summary: The entry metadata.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat
member.summary: Represents metadata returned by the ADB file sync protocol.
member.param: The device path for the file or directory entry.
The access time when reported by the device.
The metadata change time when reported by the device.
The device identifier when reported by the device.
The inode number when reported by the device.
The hard-link count when reported by the device.
The owner user identifier when reported by the device.
The owner group identifier when reported by the device.
The device-side error code for directory entries that could not be inspected.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.#ctor(System.String,System.UInt32,System.Int64,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset},System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents metadata returned by the ADB file sync protocol.
member.param: The device path for the file or directory entry.
The access time when reported by the device.
The metadata change time when reported by the device.
The device identifier when reported by the device.
The inode number when reported by the device.
The hard-link count when reported by the device.
The owner user identifier when reported by the device.
The owner group identifier when reported by the device.
The device-side error code for directory entries that could not be inspected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.Path
member.summary: The device path for the file or directory entry.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.Mode
member.summary: The Unix mode bits.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.Size
member.summary: The file size in bytes.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.ModifiedTime
member.summary: The modification time.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.AccessTime
member.summary: The access time when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.ChangeTime
member.summary: The metadata change time when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.DeviceId
member.summary: The device identifier when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.Inode
member.summary: The inode number when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.LinkCount
member.summary: The hard-link count when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.UserId
member.summary: The owner user identifier when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.GroupId
member.summary: The owner group identifier when reported by the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.DeviceErrorCode
member.summary: The device-side error code for directory entries that could not be inspected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.Exists
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the metadata describes an existing filesystem entry.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.IsDirectory
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the mode describes a directory.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.IsRegularFile
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the mode describes a regular file.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbFileStat.IsSymbolicLink
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the mode describes a symbolic link.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions
member.summary: Options used when creating Android package install sessions.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.ReplaceExisting
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether an existing package can be replaced.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.AllowTestPackages
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether test-only packages are allowed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.AllowDowngrade
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether version downgrade is allowed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.GrantRuntimePermissions
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all runtime permissions should be granted at install time.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.Staged
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the session should be staged and applied after reboot.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.EnableRollback
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether rollback should be enabled for the install session.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.DontKill
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether package manager should avoid killing the app during replacement.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.PackageName
member.summary: Gets or sets the package name to install or update.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.InheritPackageName
member.summary: Gets or sets the package name to inherit from for partial installs.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.InstallerPackageName
member.summary: Gets or sets the installer package name.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Android user id, such as 0.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbInstallOptions.StagedReadyTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the staged-session ready timeout used when committing staged sessions.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscovery
member.summary: Discovers Android Debug Bridge services advertised through mDNS/DNS-SD.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscovery.FindAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries the local network for Android ADB mDNS services.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions
member.summary: Options used when discovering ADB services through mDNS/DNS-SD.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the total discovery window.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions.ServiceKinds
member.summary: Gets or sets the service kinds to query. When omitted, all Android ADB mDNS service types are queried.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions.IncludeIPv4
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether IPv4 multicast should be queried.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsDiscoveryOptions.IncludeIPv6
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether IPv6 multicast should be queried.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService
member.summary: Describes an ADB service discovered through mDNS/DNS-SD.
member.param: The TCP port advertised by the service.
The DNS-SD TXT records advertised by the service.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.#ctor(System.String,System.String,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceKind,System.String,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Net.IPAddress},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Describes an ADB service discovered through mDNS/DNS-SD.
member.param: The TCP port advertised by the service.
The DNS-SD TXT records advertised by the service.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets the DNS-SD service instance name.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.ServiceType
member.summary: Gets the ADB DNS-SD service type.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.Kind
member.summary: Gets the recognized ADB service kind.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.TargetHost
member.summary: Gets the SRV target host name.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.Port
member.summary: Gets the TCP port advertised by the service.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.Addresses
member.summary: Gets the resolved target host addresses.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.TxtRecords
member.summary: Gets the DNS-SD TXT records advertised by the service.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService.Host
member.summary: Gets the preferred host string for direct TCP connections.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceKind
member.summary: Identifies Android Debug Bridge mDNS service categories.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceKind.LegacyAdb
member.summary: The legacy unencrypted ADB TCP service, advertised as _adb._tcp.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceKind.Pairing
member.summary: The Android 11+ wireless debugging pairing service, advertised as _adb-tls-pairing._tcp.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceKind.Connect
member.summary: The Android 11+ paired wireless debugging connection service, advertised as _adb-tls-connect._tcp.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceTypes
member.summary: Android Debug Bridge DNS-SD service type constants.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceTypes.LegacyAdb
member.summary: The legacy unencrypted ADB TCP service type.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceTypes.Pairing
member.summary: The Android 11+ wireless debugging pairing service type.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsServiceTypes.Connect
member.summary: The Android 11+ paired wireless debugging connection service type.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile
member.summary: Describes an APK or split APK stream written into an Android package install session.
member.param: The split name used by package manager, such as base.apk.
The number of bytes to write. When omitted, the remaining length of a seekable stream is used.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Describes an APK or split APK stream written into an Android package install session.
member.param: The split name used by package manager, such as base.apk.
The number of bytes to write. When omitted, the remaining length of a seekable stream is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile.Contents
member.summary: Gets the APK stream.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile.SplitName
member.summary: Gets the split name used by package manager.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile.Size
member.summary: Gets the number of bytes to write.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallResult
member.summary: Describes a completed Android package install session.
member.param: Indicates whether the install was staged for application after reboot.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Describes a completed Android package install session.
member.param: Indicates whether the install was staged for application after reboot.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallResult.SessionId
member.summary: The package manager session id.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallResult.Output
member.summary: The package manager commit output.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallResult.IsStaged
member.summary: Indicates whether the install was staged for application after reboot.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession
member.summary: Represents an active Android package install session.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.SessionId
member.summary: Gets the Android package manager session id.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.IsStaged
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a staged install session.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.WriteAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageFile,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes an APK or split APK into the install session.
member.param: Optional cumulative byte progress for this package file.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.WriteAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Int64,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes an APK or split APK stream into the install session.
member.param: The split name used by package manager.
The number of bytes to write.
Optional cumulative byte progress for this package file.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.CommitAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the install session.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageInstallSession.AbandonAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Abandons the install session.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageManagerException
member.summary: Represents a device-side Android package manager failure.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageManagerException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a device-side Android package manager failure.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPackageManagerException.Output
member.summary: Gets the raw package manager output.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingClient
member.summary: Pairs an ADB host key with an Android wireless debugging pairing endpoint.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingClient.PairAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbMdnsService,System.String,AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pairs with an Android wireless debugging endpoint discovered through mDNS.
member.param: The pairing code shown by Android wireless debugging.
The ADB host key pair to authorize.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingClient.PairAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pairs with an Android wireless debugging endpoint.
member.param: The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.
The pairing endpoint port shown by Android wireless debugging.
The pairing code shown by Android wireless debugging.
The ADB host key pair to authorize.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint
member.summary: Describes an Android wireless debugging pairing endpoint used for hardware compatibility validation.
member.param: The device vendor or OEM name used for compatibility reporting.
The device model name used for compatibility reporting.
The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.
The pairing endpoint port shown by Android wireless debugging.
The fresh pairing code shown by Android wireless debugging.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Describes an Android wireless debugging pairing endpoint used for hardware compatibility validation.
member.param: The device vendor or OEM name used for compatibility reporting.
The device model name used for compatibility reporting.
The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.
The pairing endpoint port shown by Android wireless debugging.
The fresh pairing code shown by Android wireless debugging.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.Vendor
member.summary: The device vendor or OEM name used for compatibility reporting.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.Model
member.summary: The device model name used for compatibility reporting.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.Host
member.summary: The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.PairingPort
member.summary: The pairing endpoint port shown by Android wireless debugging.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.PairingCode
member.summary: The fresh pairing code shown by Android wireless debugging.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.AdbPort
member.summary: Gets the optional ADB TCP port to probe after pairing succeeds.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.ExpectedManufacturer
member.summary: Gets the optional expected value of ro.product.manufacturer after the post-pair ADB connection succeeds.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint.ExpectedModel
member.summary: Gets the optional expected value of ro.product.model after the post-pair ADB connection succeeds.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions
member.summary: Options for Android wireless debugging pairing hardware compatibility validation.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions.PairingOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets pairing options passed to the ADB wireless pairing client.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions.AdbOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets ADB connection options used for the optional post-pair smoke check.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions.VerifyAdbConnection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the validator should connect to the ADB TCP endpoint after pairing.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions.DefaultAdbPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the default ADB TCP port used when is omitted.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult
member.summary: Reports the result of validating an Android wireless debugging pairing endpoint against real hardware.
member.param: The vendor or OEM name supplied for the endpoint.
The model name supplied for the endpoint.
The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.
A value indicating whether the pairing exchange completed.
A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check was attempted.
A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check completed.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Reports the result of validating an Android wireless debugging pairing endpoint against real hardware.
member.param: The vendor or OEM name supplied for the endpoint.
The model name supplied for the endpoint.
The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.
A value indicating whether the pairing exchange completed.
A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check was attempted.
A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check completed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.Vendor
member.summary: The vendor or OEM name supplied for the endpoint.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.Model
member.summary: The model name supplied for the endpoint.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.Host
member.summary: The pairing endpoint host name or IP address.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.PairingPort
member.summary: The pairing endpoint port.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.PairingSucceeded
member.summary: A value indicating whether the pairing exchange completed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.AdbConnectionTested
member.summary: A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check was attempted.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.AdbConnectionSucceeded
member.summary: A value indicating whether the ADB TCP smoke check completed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.Elapsed
member.summary: The elapsed validation time.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.AdbPort
member.summary: Gets the ADB TCP port used for the optional post-pair smoke check.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.PeerInfoKind
member.summary: Gets the peer-info kind returned by the device after pairing succeeds.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.DeviceGuid
member.summary: Gets the device GUID returned by the peer-info exchange when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ProductManufacturer
member.summary: Gets the manufacturer reported by ro.product.manufacturer during the post-pair ADB smoke check.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ProductModel
member.summary: Gets the model reported by ro.product.model during the post-pair ADB smoke check.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ExpectedManufacturerMatched
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the reported manufacturer matched the expected manufacturer, when one was supplied.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ExpectedModelMatched
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the reported model matched the expected model, when one was supplied.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ErrorType
member.summary: Gets the exception type when validation failed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the sanitized validation failure message.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityResult.IsCompatible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this endpoint passed the requested compatibility checks.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityValidator
member.summary: Runs an Android 11+ wireless debugging pairing compatibility check against a real device endpoint.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityValidator.ValidateAsync(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityEndpoint,AdbSharp.Authentication.Adb.AdbKeyPair,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingCompatibilityOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Pairs with a wireless debugging endpoint and optionally verifies the resulting ADB TCP endpoint.
member.param: The ADB host key used for pairing and optional ADB authorization.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingOptions
member.summary: Options used when pairing with an Android wireless debugging endpoint.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingOptions.Backend
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional backend that implements the secure ADB pairing TLS, exporter, SPAKE2, and AES-GCM operations. When omitted, the built-in managed backend is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingOptions.PublicKeyComment
member.summary: Gets or sets the public key comment placed in the host ADB public key payload.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo
member.summary: Represents the fixed-size peer information exchanged after ADB wireless pairing authentication succeeds.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo.#ctor(AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfoKind,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Represents the fixed-size peer information exchanged after ADB wireless pairing authentication succeeds.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo.WireSize
member.summary: The exact size of an ADB pairing peer-info record on the wire.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo.MaxDataSize
member.summary: The maximum peer-info payload size.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo.Kind
member.summary: Gets the peer information kind.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo.Data
member.summary: Gets the peer information payload without trailing zero padding.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfoKind
member.summary: Identifies the kind of peer information exchanged during ADB wireless pairing.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfoKind.AdbRsaPublicKey
member.summary: An ADB RSA public key payload.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfoKind.DeviceGuid
member.summary: A device GUID payload.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingResult
member.summary: Describes a completed ADB wireless pairing exchange.
member.param: The peer information returned by the Android device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingPeerInfo)
member.summary: Describes a completed ADB wireless pairing exchange.
member.param: The peer information returned by the Android device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingResult.Host
member.summary: The paired endpoint host.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingResult.Port
member.summary: The paired endpoint port.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPairingResult.PeerInfo
member.summary: The peer information returned by the Android device.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPortForward
member.summary: Represents an active local TCP listener that forwards accepted sockets to a device-side ADB endpoint.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPortForward.LocalEndPoint
member.summary: Gets the local TCP endpoint used by the listener.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbPortForward.Remote
member.summary: Gets the remote device-side socket specification.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbShellResult
member.summary: Captures the result returned by the ADB shell v2 protocol.
member.param: The process exit code, or when the device closed the stream before reporting one.
The UTF-8 decoded standard output stream.
The UTF-8 decoded standard error stream.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbShellResult.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Captures the result returned by the ADB shell v2 protocol.
member.param: The process exit code, or when the device closed the stream before reporting one.
The UTF-8 decoded standard output stream.
The UTF-8 decoded standard error stream.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbShellResult.ExitCode
member.summary: The process exit code, or when the device closed the stream before reporting one.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbShellResult.StandardOutput
member.summary: The UTF-8 decoded standard output stream.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbShellResult.StandardError
member.summary: The UTF-8 decoded standard error stream.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec
member.summary: Represents an ADB socket specification such as tcp:5555 or localabstract:debug.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The encoded socket specification sent to the device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.Value
member.summary: Gets the encoded socket specification sent to the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.Tcp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a TCP socket specification.
member.param: The TCP port. Use zero for an automatically selected local port where supported.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.LocalAbstract(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Linux abstract namespace local socket specification.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.LocalReserved(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Linux reserved namespace local socket specification.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.LocalFileSystem(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Linux filesystem namespace local socket specification.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.Device(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a device file socket specification.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSocketSpec.Jdwp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a JDWP process socket specification.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream
member.summary: Represents a multiplexed ADB logical stream.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.LocalId
member.summary: Gets the local stream identifier.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.RemoteId
member.summary: Gets the remote stream identifier after the stream is opened.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.ReadAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads stream data.
member.returns: The number of bytes read, or zero when the stream is closed.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes stream data.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.ReadExactlyAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads exactly the requested number of bytes unless the stream closes.
member.exception: The stream closed before enough bytes were read.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbStream.ReadToEndAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads the stream until it closes.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSyncException
member.summary: Represents an ADB file sync protocol or device-side filesystem failure.
member.param: The remote path associated with the failure.
The device-side error code when reported.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSyncException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Represents an ADB file sync protocol or device-side filesystem failure.
member.param: The remote path associated with the failure.
The device-side error code when reported.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSyncException.RemotePath
member.summary: Gets the remote path associated with the failure.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Adb.AdbSyncException.DeviceErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the device-side error code when reported.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingBackend
member.summary: Creates secure ADB pairing connections.
member.remarks: Implementations are responsible for the ADB pairing TLS handshake, TLS keying-material export, SPAKE2 message generation, and AES-GCM peer-info encryption.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingBackend.ConnectAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a secure pairing connection over an already-connected transport stream.
member.param: The client certificate derived from the ADB host key.
The pairing code entered by the user.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection
member.summary: Represents an authenticated secure channel for the ADB wireless pairing packet exchange.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.CreateClientMessageAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the local SPAKE2 pairing message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.InitializeCipherAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes peer-info encryption from the peer SPAKE2 message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.EncryptAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Encrypts a pairing peer-info payload.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.DecryptAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Decrypts a pairing peer-info payload.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.ReadExactlyAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads exactly the requested number of bytes from the secure transport.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.IAdbPairingSecureConnection.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes bytes to the secure transport.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Adb.Internal.AdbPackageManagerOutput.InstallSessionRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
Success:\s+created install session \[(?<id>\d+)\]
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match the string "Success:".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "created install session [".
○ "id" capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match ']'.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the InstallSessionRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.InstallSessionRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.summary: Supports searching for the string "Success:".
